name: agent-bridge
description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server: exposes `gemini_agent` (spawn a Gemini agent via the Antigravity `agy` CLI), `claude_agent` (spawn a Claude agent via the `claude` CLI), and `codex_agent` (spawn an OpenAI Codex agent via the `codex` CLI), plus skills for delegating to Gemini and for running cross-model code reviews.
